title: The Seasons That Made Me
description: A collection of deeply personal essays on growth, loss, and the cyclical nature of our creative lives.
body: > Time is not marked by the calendar but by the passage of seasons. Each season bears its own imprint, but it is the slow layering of years that etches the deeper recollections. The smell of rain, the sting of snow on bare skin, the taste of certain foods, the echoes of old songs are not merely memories, but rituals that shape who we become. These impressions form the spine of the personal essays and poems in this collection.

seo.metaTitle: The Seasons That Made Me | Edmond A Porter
seo.metaDescription: A collection of deeply personal essays on growth, loss, and the cyclical nature of our creative lives.
